---
layout: default
title: Data Management
---

This will have introduction information about the page and the data management steps
## Before the survey
### Getting the CLAMS database ready

## During the survey
### Steps


### Initial QAQC of raw data

### Data flow diagram

## After the survey
### Steps
* Additions to the data (ages, diets, etc)
* Final QAQC
* Archive staging to sqlite file and store
* Copy staging to production
* Clear out staging
